.. _document:

document
========

Summary
-------

+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+
|                 |                 |*unique*         |True             |
+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+
+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+
|**layout_tiles** |[]               |                 |                 |
+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+
+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+
|**output**       |plot.png         |                 |                 |
+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+
|                 |                 |*lowercase*      |False            |

|                 |                 |*unique*         |True             |

|**size**         |[]               |                 |                 |
+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+
|                 |                 |*alias*          |documentSize     |
+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+
|                 |                 |                 |documentsize     |
+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+
+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+
|**title**        |None             |                 |                 |
+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+
|                 |                 |*lowercase*      |False            |
+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+
|                 |                 |*optional*       |True             |
+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+
+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+
|**title_font**   |                 |                 |                 |
+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+
|                 |                 |*type*           |plotfont         |
+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+
|                 |                 |*unique*         |True             |
+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+
+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+-----------------+

Keywords
--------

datahook
^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

This is a callable which is called for each set of data retrieved / computed during the production of the plot. This is particularly handy for printing out values etc... A standard datahook is provided, it is called printhook

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

has_title
^^^^^^^^^

default: **False**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

interactive
^^^^^^^^^^^

default: **True**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|type                                             |bool                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

layout
^^^^^^

default: **1, 1**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

layout_tiles
^^^^^^^^^^^^

default: **""**

output
^^^^^^

default: **plot.png**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

plot
^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |plots                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

plotdata
^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

size
^^^^

default: **""**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |documentSize                                     |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |documentsize                                     |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

title
^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

title_font
^^^^^^^^^^

default: **""**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|type                                             |plotfont                                         |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
